title: <div>2.            How did your experience as a Miami Dade College student influ
content:
2. How did your experience as a Miami Dade College student influence your career direction?
Miami Dade College symbolizes the pivotal starting point of my journey toward becoming a pharmacist, offering not only academic rigor but also a supportive environment that nurtured my passion for healthcare. It's where I laid the groundwork for my future career, surrounded by a diverse community dedicated to excellence and service in the field of pharmacy.
3. What is your proudest accomplishment in your career?
My proudest accomplishment in my career is successfully balancing my role as a pharmacist for Publix, serving communities across Florida and North Carolina, while also fulfilling my duties as a dedicated wife and mother of three. I take immense pride in managing both professional and personal responsibilities effectively, contributing to my family's well-being while making a positive impact on the health and well-being of countless individuals through my work as a pharmacist.
Thank you,
Stephanie Ann Perez, PharmD
Central Pharmacy Pharmacist
